---
name: System Boundary Request
description: Request or revise AI/system authority boundaries and human control points.
title: "System boundary request: <short title>"
labels: ["architecture", "boundary", "governance"]
assignees: []
---

## Boundary Change Request
Describe the boundary to add, remove, or modify.

## Current Boundary
What is the current AI/human control split?

## Proposed Boundary
What is the proposed AI/human control split?

## Affected Security Boundary
Does this affect identity, authorization, secrets, data handling, or production controls?

## Threat or Misuse Scenario
What could go wrong if this is misused or drifts?

## Guardrails / Controls
What guardrails are being added or modified?

## Approval Authority
Which human role must approve this boundary change?

## Audit and Logging Impact
How will this change appear in audit artifacts?

## Failure Handling and Containment
- Failure handling:
- Rollback/containment plan:

## Operational Impact
Describe expected impact on workflows, review load, and maintainability.
